understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle run by solving each level within the step budget: place every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN, then progress through all levels until the run reports final WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controlled one currently selected piece (shown as 'P' in the semantic grid, with other selectables as 'S'). MOVE actions shifted the selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by boundaries or wall objects ('#'); adjacent blocks ('B') could be pushed if space allowed, moving together with the selected piece. Some boundaries/walls could behave inconsistently, so attempting moves was sometimes needed despite the movement_blocked hint, which only indicated adjacency and not guaranteed failure. CLICK switched control to another selectable by providing its exact pixel/grid coordinate from the state (e.g., [33, 21]).

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear boxed in by walls; try moving right to probe for any non-blocking/teleporting wall behavior.
history.reasoning: We appear boxed in by walls; try moving right to probe for any non-blocking/teleporting wall behavior.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear boxed in by walls; try moving into the right wall to test for any wrap/teleport/slide behavior.
history.reasoning: We appear boxed in by walls; try moving into the right wall to test for any wrap/teleport/slide behavior.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving into the adjacent selectable/wall to see if it can be pushed or if it swaps/merges behavior to escape the enclosure.
history.reasoning: Try moving into the adjacent selectable/wall to see if it can be pushed or if it swaps/merges behavior to escape the enclosure.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; switch to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all sides; switch to the other selectable at [33,21] to try reaching the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_RIGHT | Move onto the adjacent goal tile to the right; goals are non-collidable so this should place the piece on it.
history.reasoning: Move onto the adjacent goal tile to the right; goals are non-collidable so this should place the piece on it.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_RIGHT | Move onto the right-side goal tile so the selected piece occupies the goal area.
history.reasoning: Move onto the right-side goal tile so the selected piece occupies the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_LEFT | We’re adjacent to the goal area on the left; move left onto it (walls should prevent overshooting).
history.reasoning: We’re adjacent to the goal area on the left; move left onto it (walls should prevent overshooting).

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_RIGHT | We need the selected piece to occupy the single goal tile; try moving onto the adjacent goal area to the right (goals are non-collidable despite the blocked hint).
history.reasoning: We need the selected piece to occupy the single goal tile; try moving onto the adjacent goal area to the right (goals are non-collidable despite the blocked hint).

history.summary: Turn 9: MOVE_LEFT | We need the selected piece to occupy the goal area; try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to the left despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: We need the selected piece to occupy the goal area; try moving onto the adjacent goal tile to the left despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 10: MOVE_RIGHT | Try stepping onto the right-side goal tile within the + cluster to occupy it.
history.reasoning: Try stepping onto the right-side goal tile within the + cluster to occupy it.

history.summary: Turn 11: MOVE_LEFT | We’re already adjacent to the goal area; try moving left onto the goal tiles (non-collidable) despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: We’re already adjacent to the goal area; try moving left onto the goal tiles (non-collidable) despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 12: MOVE_UP | The selected piece is adjacent to the goal area; try moving up into the goal tile (it may allow overlap despite being flagged blocked).
history.reasoning: The selected piece is adjacent to the goal area; try moving up into the goal tile (it may allow overlap despite being flagged blocked).
